title: Task: Critique the decision from a maintenance/orchestration perspective. We are considering creating `soul.md` or `philosophy.md` for Kernel by extracting from Obsidian notes. Read: - /Users/masayuki/AGENTS.md - /Users/masayuki/.claude/CODEX.md - /Users/masayuki/.codex/prompts/kernel.md - /Users/ma...
summary_text: **Findings (Top Risks / Failure Modes)** 1. `soul.md` - Failure mode: anthropomorphic language becomes pseudo-policy and overrides operational rules during ambiguity. - Why risky: seed claim is slogan-style (`AIに魂を吹き込め`) and not testable policy ([Seed1:12](/Users/masayuki/Obsidian%20Project%20Kit%20for%20Market/05_Beliefs/_Seeds/Seed%20-%20AI開発においては、技術だけでなく倫理観や哲学に基づいた人格設計が重要である.md:12)). - Orchestration impact: higher chance of lane drift from explicit Kernel constraints (multi-lane/quorum/blocked rules) into “persona preference” decisions ([CODEX.md:29](/Users/masayuki/.claude/CODEX.md:29), [kernel.md:50](/Users/masayuki/.codex/prompts/kernel.md:50), [kernel.md:76](/Users/masayuki/.codex/prompts/kernel.md:76)). 2. `philosophy.md` - Failure mode: broad values text silently expands authority and starts redefining runtime behavior. - Why risky: Kernel command contracts already have an explicit source of truth; adding another quasi-authoritative layer can create interpretation conflict ([AGENTS.md:57](/Users/masayuki/AGENTS.md:57), [CODEX.md:21](/Users/masayuki/.claude/CODEX.md:21), [CODEX.md:24](/Users/masayuki/.claude/CODEX.md:24)). - Orchestration impact: manageable if explicitly non-normative and on-demand only. 3. `soul.md` + `philosophy.md` (both) - Failure mode: split doctrine and update drift (which one governs?). - Why risky: violates “keep always-loaded files thin / declarative” and increases maintenance coupling ([AGENTS.md:6](/Users/masayuki/AGENTS.md:6), [AGENTS.md:55](/Users/masayuki/AGENTS.md:55)). - Extra risk from source quality: all three candidate seed notes are `status: draft` with incomplete Ethos evidence fields, so direct extraction imports unstable content into runtime-adjacent docs ([Seed1:4](/Users/masayuki/Obsidian%20Project%20Kit%20for%20Market/05_Beliefs/_Seeds/Seed%20-%20AI開発においては、技術だけでなく倫理観や哲学に基づいた人格設計が重要である.md:4), [Seed2:4](/Users/masayuki/Obsidian%20Project%20Kit%20for%20Market/05_Beliefs/_Seeds/Seed%20-%20AI選択においては、利便性や性能だけでなく、個人の理念や信条との整合性を重視することが重要である.md:4), [Seed3:4](/Users/masayuki/Obsidian%20Project%20Kit%20for%20Market/05_Beliefs/_Seeds/Seed%20-%20AI時代においては、個人の思想や哲学への共感が、技術的な均質化の中で差別化要因として重要性を増す.md:4)). **Scores (0-10)** - Scale: maintenance cost/risk = higher is worse; usefulness = higher is better. | Option | Maintenance Cost | Misuse Risk | Usefulness to Multi-Agent Orchestration | |---|---:|---:|---:| | `soul.md` | 7 | 8 | 4 | | `philosophy.md` | 4 | 5 | 8 | | both | 9 | 9 | 5 | **Lane Verdict + Guardrails** - Verdict: choose `philosophy.md` only; do not create `soul.md` as a runtime-adjacent governance file. - Guardrails: - Mark `philosophy.md` as non-authoritative guidance: “cannot override `AGENTS.md`, `CODEX.md`, `kernel.md`.” - Keep it on-demand, not always-loaded. - Use strict, testable format (`Principle`, `Allowed`, `Disallowed`, `Conflict Rule`) and ban slogan wording. - No direct import from `draft` seeds; require curation + evidence completion first. - Before activation, run a required 3-lane simulation review; single-lane adoption is a Kernel workflow violation.
